name: @agent-generator/mobile
description: Capacitor 6 mobile shell for Agent Generator. Wraps frontend/dist to produce signed Android AABs (Play Store internal track) and stays iOS-ready. Signed CI builds in Batch 29.

scripts.run:android: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.build:android: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
